message:
feat(cli): refactor install commands with shared config helpers and add e2e tests

Extract duplicated JSON config handling from install_claude_desktop() and
install_cursor() into three reusable helpers:

- read_json_config_or_empty(): read JSON config or return empty object
- write_json_config(): pretty-print JSON with parent dir creation
- create_backup_if_exists(): .bak backup before modification

install_claude_desktop() and install_cursor():
- Refactored to use extracted helpers (~60 lines deduplication)
- Added explicit validation that root config is a JSON object
- Updated dry-run messaging to "Dry-run: proposed update"
- Backup path now shown in success output

install_cline() (VS Code):
- Upgraded from passive instruction printing to active config modification
- Merges settings under cline.mcpServers key
- Implements backup and write logic via shared helpers

New: crates/fastmcp-cli/tests/e2e_install.rs
- E2E test infrastructure with isolated temp HOME directories
- Platform-specific config path helpers (Claude/Cursor/Cline)
- Test: install_claude_modifies_config_and_creates_backup
- Tests for dry-run mode, invalid JSON handling, backup creation

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
